title: Yo-kai Watch: Komasan's Journey
description: A mod that adds Yokai-Watch universe to minecraft!
body:
[![It represents the Komasan's Journey logo with a forest in the background and a Komasan wandering around.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f7745be8d1400d4384c48e9d3765e4fc6d6a875_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/komasans_journey/)
# Description  
**Komasan's Journey adds a whole new world full of Yo-kai! Discover many new creatures on your adventure!**

## Features  
- A lot of new foods are planned, but for now, there's only ice cream!  
- The mod also introduces brand-new tools that you can craft using souls (obtained by killing Yo-kai)!  
- Currently, only Komasan can be found wandering around — but more Yo-kai will be added in the future!

## Translations  
We're working to make Komasan's Journey available in as many languages as possible. Currently, the mod is available in **English and French**.

## Installation  
**Forge:**  
- Requires [Forge 1.20.1](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.1.html)  
- Requires [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) for Forge  
- Place both GeckoLib and Komasan's Journey in your **mods** folder.

## Issues  
If you experience any issues while playing, please report them on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/mkETQKKY84)!  
Make sure to describe the issue as clearly as possible.
